note: Storage footprint compaction. (A) prune done enrich_queue rows (the CRITICAL runaway), (B) NULL source_record.payload after fields are extracted into provenance (~1.8KB/row [EST] reclaimed), (C) VACUUM. DRY-RUN by default (ATLAS_FP_APPLY unset = report only). No CREATE/ALTER/DROP. Keeps content_hash for idempotency; never nulls un-extracted payloads.

steps.note: Footprint compaction. Fetch+sha-verify atlas_footprint_compact.py; pip psycopg2-binary; --selftest (no DB); then a DRY-RUN that only REPORTS candidate counts + pg_total_relation_size before/after. To actually reclaim: re-run with ATLAS_FP_APPLY=1 (prunes done-queue older than ATLAS_FP_QUEUE_GRACE_MIN=60, nulls extracted payloads in bounded batches, VACUUMs). Idempotent + fail-soft.

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS footprint compaction (prune done enrich_queue + null extracted source_record.payload + VACUUM; DRY-RUN unless ATLAS_FP_APPLY=1)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=ATLAS_FP_APPLY=0
Environment=ATLAS_FP_QUEUE_GRACE_MIN=60
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_footprint_compact.py
TimeoutStartSec=60min

[Unit]
Description=Run ATLAS footprint compaction every 15 min (drain done-queue; DRY-RUN until promoted to apply)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=8min
OnUnitActiveSec=15min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-footprint-compact.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_footprint_compact.py':'ceef01d0445ca58adf9c125d76ae3e4d94719ec9740a45ac33d088cac1ad170d'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"
